ping.title: 🏓 Ping
ping.description: Quick health-check command that confirms Veyra is online and responding normally. Great for checking whether delays are from the bot or from Discord/network lag.
ping.notes: If this responds instantly but another command feels slow, the issue is usually command-specific or network-side.

flipcoin.title: 🪙 Flipcoin
flipcoin.description: Simple fun command that flips a virtual coin and returns heads or tails. No hidden weighting, just pure RNG.
flipcoin.notes: Great for quick tie-breaks or bad decisions.

solve_wordle.title: 🧠 Solve Wordle
solve_wordle.description: Starts an interactive helper flow for solving Wordle. Veyra guides your guesses based on feedback patterns so you can converge faster than random guessing.
solve_wordle.notes: If you already have guess/pattern history, use `/wordle_hint` directly.

play.title: 🎮 Play
play.description: Launches Veyra's number-guessing mini-game. Progress through stages by guessing correctly to earn better rewards.
play.notes: Higher stages usually improve reward quality.

info.title: ℹ️ Info
info.description: Shows detailed information for an item, including useful metadata for deciding whether to keep, use, trade, or sell it.
info.notes: For broader inventory systems and item flow, use `/details inventory`.

use.title: 🪄 Use
use.description: Consumes and applies a usable item from your inventory. Effects depend on the specific item type and current context.
use.notes: For item categories and inventory behavior, use `/details inventory`.

open.title: 🎁 Open
open.description: Opens a lootbox from your inventory and grants randomized rewards. Loot quality depends on the box type you open.
open.notes: Lootboxes are also relevant to quest progress for lootbox-based quests.

buy.title: 🛍️ Buy
buy.description: Buys item(s) from the daily shop using gold. Supports single-item purchases or bulk purchases when amount is provided.
buy.notes: For full shop and inventory economy behavior, use `/details inventory`.

sell.title: 💸 Sell
sell.description: Sells item(s) back through supported buyback routes. Useful for converting unused resources into gold.
sell.notes: For economy loops and resource strategy, use `/details inventory`.

buychips.title: 🪙 Buychips
buychips.description: Converts gold into casino chips using a selected offer pack. Chips are required to participate in casino flows.
buychips.notes: Use `/casino` to view current chip/cashout offers and `/details gambling` for full gambling guide.

cashout.title: 💵 Cashout
cashout.description: Converts your chips back into gold using current cashout offers. Final return depends on the selected pack rate.
cashout.notes: Use `/casino` for current rates and `/details gambling` for the full gambling system.

unlock.title: 🔓 Unlock
unlock.description: Unlocks a progression building/machine so you can start using that gameplay system and later upgrade it.
unlock.notes: For smelting progression details, use `/details smelting`; for potion progression, use `/details alchemy`.

upgrade.title: 📈 Upgrade
upgrade.description: Upgrades an unlocked building to improve efficiency, storage, or unlock stronger output depending on the building.
upgrade.notes: Related guides: `/details smelting`, `/details alchemy`, and `/details inventory` depending on building.

bet.title: 🏇 Bet
bet.description: Places a race bet while the race betting window is open. Your payout depends on outcome and pool distribution.
bet.notes: For full race mechanics and strategy, use `/details race`.

helloveyra.title: 👋 HelloVeyra
helloveyra.description: Onboarding command that introduces/registers you with Veyra so account-linked systems can be used properly.
helloveyra.notes: Run this first if you are a brand-new player.

repayloan.title: 💳 Repayloan
repayloan.description: Repays your currently active loan and clears debt-related restrictions once payment succeeds.
repayloan.notes: For loan behavior, terms, and penalties, use `/details loan`.

help.title: 🙋 Help
help.description: Opens Veyra's interactive help menu with separate pages for prefix and slash command families.
help.notes: Best starting point if you are exploring commands.

commandhelp.title: 📚 Commandhelp
commandhelp.description: Shows detailed documentation for one selected command, including usage, examples, cooldown, and context notes.
commandhelp.notes: Autocomplete is enabled so you can quickly find available command docs.

details.title: 🧭 Details
details.description: Opens topic-based guides with paginated explanations for major systems like battle, jobs, quests, and more.
details.notes: Use this whenever you want full system explanations instead of command-only docs.

introduction.title: 📝 Introduction
introduction.description: Opens an introduction modal so you can post a structured intro about yourself in supported servers/channels.
introduction.notes: Modal-based command: expects form input, not plain text arguments.

profile.title: 🧾 Profile
profile.description: Shows your full profile card and progression details through a paginated interactive embed.
profile.notes: Useful for checking growth, progression, and overall account state.

invite.title: 🎟️ Invite
invite.description: Displays referral progress, milestone tracking, and the next invite reward you can unlock.
invite.notes: Good command to track referral/event progress at a glance.

battle.title: ⚔️ Battle
battle.description: Challenges another player to a turn-based PvP battle with a gold bet. Winner takes the pot after system fee.
battle.notes: For full mechanics, stances, and strategy, use `/details battle`.

loadout.title: 🧰 Loadout
loadout.description: Opens the loadout interface to configure your battle weapon and spell setup before PvP/PvE fights.

campaign.title: 🗺️ Campaign
campaign.description: Starts a PvE campaign fight against stage-based enemies. Great for progression and learning battle flow.
campaign.notes: Battle system tips and interactions are covered in `/details battle`.

open_to_battle.title: 🤝 Open To Battle
open_to_battle.description: Joins auto-match PvP queue by your selected minimum and maximum bet range.
open_to_battle.notes: For battle fundamentals and matchup logic, use `/details battle`.

smelt.title: 🔥 Smelt
smelt.description: Converts ores into bars using your smelter and fuel resources. Core command for metal progression.
smelt.notes: For recipes, requirements, and progression, use `/details smelting`.

brew.title: 🧪 Brew
brew.description: Brews potions at your brewing stand using available ingredients from your inventory.
brew.notes: For ingredients and potion behavior, use `/details alchemy` and `/details potions`.

leaderboard.title: 📈 Leaderboard
leaderboard.description: Shows top users ranked by gold so you can track current economy leaders and weekly competition.
leaderboard.notes: Useful for checking your position against top wallets.

loan.title: 🏦 Loan
loan.description: Opens starter loan terms and lets eligible users accept the loan through interactive confirmation.
loan.notes: For loan rules and debt system context, use `/details loan`.

transfer_gold.title: 💰 Transfer Gold
transfer_gold.description: Transfers gold to another user. Includes transfer logic/fees and validates recipient eligibility.
transfer_gold.notes: Use this for direct player-to-player economy interactions.

start_race.title: 🏁 Start Race
start_race.description: Starts an animal race event, opens betting window, then runs race resolution after betting closes.
start_race.notes: For race mechanics and betting context, use `/details race`.

wordle_hint.title: 🧩 Wordle Hint
wordle_hint.description: Generates a suggested next Wordle guess based on your supplied guess/pattern history.
wordle_hint.notes: Works best when your pattern history is accurate.

quest.title: 📜 Quest
quest.description: Shows your current quest status, progress, reward information, and state-based actions like skip, claim, or get new quest.
quest.notes: For full quest mechanics and strategy, use `/details quests`.

transfer_item.title: 📦 Transfer Item
transfer_item.description: Transfers inventory items to another user with quantity validation and item name resolution.
transfer_item.notes: For item flow and inventory systems, use `/details inventory`.

find_item.title: 🔎 Find Item
find_item.description: Checks where an item can currently be obtained (for example shop/market/player routes).
find_item.notes: For inventory ecosystem behavior, use `/details inventory`.

create_listing.title: 🧾 Create Listing
create_listing.description: Creates a marketplace listing for your item at your chosen quantity and per-unit price.
create_listing.notes: For broader item economy context, use `/details inventory`.

loadmarketplace.title: 🛍️ Loadmarketplace
loadmarketplace.description: Loads and paginates active marketplace listings so you can browse current player offers.
loadmarketplace.notes: For market-item flow understanding, use `/details inventory`.

buy_from_marketplace.title: 🪙 Buy From Marketplace
buy_from_marketplace.description: Buys quantity from a listing by ID after validating stock, wallet, and inventory constraints.
buy_from_marketplace.notes: For marketplace/item systems context, use `/details inventory`.

delete_listing.title: 🗑️ Delete Listing
delete_listing.description: Deletes one of your own marketplace listings when you want to cancel or relist at a different price.
delete_listing.notes: Only the listing owner can delete it.

shop.title: 🛒 Shop
shop.description: Opens the daily shop interface with sell/buyback offerings and interactive purchase controls.
shop.notes: For item economy overview, use `/details inventory`.

casino.title: 🎰 Casino
casino.description: Opens casino UI for chip purchase, cashout offers, and entry points into gambling loops.
casino.notes: For games, odds, and strategy context, use `/details gambling`.

work.title: 🛠️ Work
work.description: Job command group. Lets you run job actions through subcommands (`knight`, `digger`, `miner`, `explorer`, `thief`) to earn resources and progression rewards.
work.notes: For full job roles, outcomes, and strategy, use `/details jobs`.

check.title: 📊 Check
check.description: Status command group for quick personal stats. Includes wallet, energy, inventory, exp, smelter, brewing stand, pockets, and status views.
check.notes: For deeper system explanations, pair this with `/details` topic guides.

gamble.title: 🎲 Gamble
gamble.description: Casino game command group. Play one of the subgames (`flipcoin`, `roulette`, `slots`, `dungeon`) with your chosen bet.
gamble.notes: For complete gambling mechanics and advice, use `/details gambling`.
